summary: 14 candidates researched, 13 resolved (12 adopt, 1 build: Dart PEM port). One contested choice flagged for user: write-path sync (DIY-via-forge recommended vs PowerSync vs PES-now). Major correction: pglite-oxide is desktop-only WASM-runtime (docs wrong) — mobile = SQLite+sqlite-vec. New changes C-9 (doc corrections), C-10 (startup orchestration), C-11 (Flint integration layer). Per-platform data matrix and KnowMe target definition established. All Flint deps unpublished -> git deps pinned to SHAs.
